name: office-os
description: Local-first Office workflows with immutable sources, managed candidate editing, bounded publishing, and optional recurrence.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded local Office work from plain language.
interface.longDescription: Classifies an Office request, asks one short owner question at a time, edits only managed candidates, processes Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and read-only PDF files in semantic units, publishes one stable output without changing sources, and offers recurrence only after acceptance.
defaultPrompt: 整理這個 Excel，保留原檔並輸出可直接使用的版本。
檢查這份 Word 或 PowerPoint，快速修正內容與版面。
把這項辦公室工作完成後設成固定排程。
